title: 10 best herbal essential oils for ulcerative colitis
description: Origanum majorana, also known as sweet marjoram, essential oils helps with ulcerative colitis because of its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The oil contains compounds such as linalool and alpha-pinene, which have been shown to reduce inflammation in the gut and promote healing of the colon mucosa.
